title: Local MT Model Bundle Manifest (JV-09)
description: Pinned manifest describing one local MT (or STT) model bundle. The runtime validates every field before any network request and writes a consent record using `id`, `version`, `license`, and `source_url` before downloading any byte. See src/providers/local/model_download.rs (`ModelBundleManifest`).

id.description: Stable model identifier. Used as the consent-record key and as the default cache subdirectory under `%LOCALAPPDATA%/tui-translator/models/mt/<id>`. Must remain stable across bundle revisions of the same model.

display_name.description: Human-readable name shown to operators before download.

version.description: Monotonic version string. Changing this triggers a fresh consent prompt (Stale -> re-consent).

license.description: Short SPDX identifier or full licence text shown to the user before download. Stored in the consent record as `license_text`.

source_url.description: Provenance / licence URL pointing to the upstream model card. Stored in the consent record as `license_url`.

files.description: Files that make up the bundle. Every entry is validated for SHA-256 length and path safety before any network request is sent.

relative_path.description: Destination path relative to the bundle directory. Must not start with `/` or `\`, must not contain `..`, and must not contain a drive prefix (`C:\...`). Validated by `safe_relative_path`.

download_url.description: HTTPS URL for the file. The downloader supports resume via HTTP Range requests when the server returns 206 Partial Content.

size_bytes.description: Expected total byte size. The downloader compares both the advertised `Content-Length` and the final on-disk size to this value.

sha256.description: Expected SHA-256 digest of the entire file as 64 lower-case hex characters. Mismatch triggers a quarantine + `ChecksumMismatch` error.
